updates.title: June 16, 2026
updates.body:
Slight improvement on front page preview screen.
Starting working on another game, Mortal Kombat themed. Having some difficulty generating good character appearances.
Dabbled on created AI slop video content.

updates.title: June 15, 2026
updates.body: I'm switching to Claude atp. Worked on the game and improved trollrunner.net preview screen.

updates.title: June 14, 2026
updates.body:
Working on my first troll game- Troll Runner. Temple Run style. BRING BACK NOSTALGIA.
Fixed some admin system bugs.
